'''Takari''' was a small [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Iyuta]] in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. It was considered to be a resort town, where outrageous prices were charged for lodgings and [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]]. Takari was served by the [[Iyuta spaceport]] where docking fees for mediocre facilities was expensive. Several [[Cantina/Legends|bars]] were located on [[The Strip]], a section of [[Vark Street]], which catered to off-duty [[Imperial Marines/Legends|Imperial Marines]]. [[The Rusty Bucket]] bar was situated in Takari, as was [[The Giant Step]] which was located on [[The Strip]]. An [[Imperial Communications Center (Iyuta)|Imperial Communications Center]] was located just outside Takari, built over an old sewer system.<ref name="Plant" />
